Short description: The TapeTech EHWJS100 Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry’s most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS100 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision.
Description: The TapeTech EHWJS100 Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry’s most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS100 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision. The EHWJS100 weighs just 30 pounds and sets up in under 2 minutes. It can make straight through cuts, including ripping thicker panels to thinner dimensions, miter cuts, bevel cuts, compound miters and notches in the face or end of foam panels. EHWJS100 includes a scaffolding strap to securely strap the unit to the railing of scaffolding and staging to prevent accidental equipment falls. The superalloy NiChrome hot wire heats to 932°F (500°C) in seconds to make any jobsite a highly productive foam-cutting environment. Features a spring-loaded safety switch. The hot wire element (EHW100) is easy to replace and requires no tools. Hot wire lasts approximately 70 hours of cutting time. Max. Cutting Height 50.8″ (1290 mm) Max.
